channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Saints, Pelicans announce member of video production team among those killed in New Orleans terrorist attack
item.description: The New Orleans Saints and Pelicans announced a member of their video production team with ASM New Orleans was killed in the terror attack on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Donate blood in January for chance to win trip for 2 to Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The American Red Cross and the NFL are offering two tickets to the Super Bowl to encourage people to donate blood this month.
item.dc:creator: Kayla Clarke, Dane Kelly, Local 4

item.title: Sharks veteran defenseman to make season debut vs. Lightning
item.description: NHL: Defenseman Marc-Edouard Vlasic will be in the lineup Thursday when the San Jose Sharks play the Tampa Bay Lightning
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: UFL releases 2025 schedule; Stallions look for another title
item.description: The United Football League released its 2025 schedule Thursday. Spring football returns in late March with the Birmingham Stallions looking to defend their title.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pistons guard Jaden Ivey has surgery on leg he broke in collision vs. Magic
item.description: Detroit Pistons guard Jaden Ivey had surgery on his left leg, a day after breaking his fibula in a collision during a win over the Orlando Magic.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Antetokounmpo, Jokic and James among early NBA All-Star leading vote-getters
item.description: Milwaukee’s Giannis Antetokounmpo is the early leader in fan balloting for the NBA All-Star Game, and LeBron James of the Los Angeles Lakers seems well on his way toward extending his record and getting picked for a 21st time.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Superdome re-opens from lockdown for the Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame
item.description: Flags are at half-staff outside the Superdome and at nearby state buildings as fans arrive a day later than scheduled for a College Football Playoff quarterfinal game between Notre Dame and Georgia at the Sugar Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Broncos insist they don't care who sits out for Chiefs as Denver seeks to end a long playoff drought
item.description: The Denver Broncos aren't necessarily breathing any easier knowing they won't have to face Patrick Mahomes and several other Kansas City Chiefs starters on Sunday with a playoff berth on the line.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Golf goes indoors on prime time with high-tech TGL league
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Xander Schauffele is making his season debut twice in the span of seven days at venues separated by a lot more than some 5,000 miles.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Georgia, Notre Dame fans make Sugar Bowl decision as game is postponed over terror attack
item.description: Georgia and Notre Dame prepare to play in the Sugar Bowl on Thursday after the game was postponed due to a terror attack on Bourbon Street in New Orleans.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin aiming to be back on snow 'in the next week or so' following November crash
item.description: Mikaela Shiffrin is back in the gym and aiming to be on snow “in the next week or so,” the American skiing star said more than a month after suffering a deep puncture wound in her hip area. The serious injury occurred during a during a crash on Nov. 30 in Killington, Vermont.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pro Bowl rosters include 9 Ravens, 7 Lions, 6 Vikings and Eagles and no Patrick Mahomes
item.description: Nine Baltimore Ravens, including two-time NFL MVP Lamar Jackson and Derrick Henry, were selected for the Pro Bowl Games.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Aaron Rodgers says Jets' season finale vs. Dolphins could be his last NFL game
item.description: Aaron Rodgers was questioned by reporters on Wednesday whether the Jets' season finale against the Dolphins could be his final NFL game, and he said 'of course'
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Penn State takes simple approach during ride into CFP semifinals
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Football coaches, perhaps more than in other sports, are huge proponents of structure, routine, consistent messaging. Since the early days of his time in Happy Valley, Penn State's James Franklin has adhered to the philosophy of 1-0. Yes, it's a cliche.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sugar Bowl CFP quarterfinal between Georgia and Notre Dame postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame was postponed a day because of an attack about a mile away from the Superdome early Wednesday, when authorities say a truck driver deliberately plowed into a New Year’s crowd and killed 15 people.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Targeting no-call at Peach Bowl raises more questions about disputed rule
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Peach Bowl referee declined to call a targeting penalty late in the fourth quarter for a helmet-to-helmet hit by Texas safety Michael Taaffe that could've given Arizona State a chance to kick a winning field goal in the College Football Playoff quarterfinals Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White Sox trade for left-handed reliever from Phillies
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox traded for a left-handed reliever from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for a minor league prospect. In exchange for minor-league right-hander Aaron Combs, the White Sox acquired 31-year-old left-handed pitcher Tyler Gilbert from the Phillies.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Holiday Classic: Father Judge 80, Carlsbad 70
item.description: In the Third-Place game for the National Bracket of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Father Judge High School from Philadelphia, PA defeats Carlsbad 80-70.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. They made fun of him. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jayden Daniels dazzles again as Commanders clinch a playoff spot by beating Falcons 30-24 in OT
item.description: Jayden Daniels connected with Zach Ertz in overtime for his third touchdown pass of the game to clinch a playoff spot by beating the Atlanta Falcons 30-24 in overtime Sunday night in a back-and-forth prime-time showdown between highly drafted rookie quarterbacks.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFC's No. 1 seed comes down to Vikings-Lions showdown at Detroit in Week 18
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed will come down to the final game of the regular season when the Detroit Lions host the Minnesota Vikings next Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mayfield throws 5 TD passes and Bucs keep playoff, NFC South hopes alive with 48-14 rout of Panthers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers played like a team determined to do whatever's necessary to make the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lakers send D'Angelo Russell to Nets in trade for Dorian Finney-Smith, Shake Milton
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers have traded guard D'Angelo Russell to the Brooklyn Nets for forward Dorian Finney-Smith and guard Shake Milton. The Lakers also sent forward Maxwell Lewis and three second-round draft picks to Brooklyn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs deal former 1B prospect Matt Mervis to Marlins for utilityman
item.description: The Cubs have traded one former infield prospect for another. ESPN's Jeff Passan reported on his X feed early Sunday afternoon that the Cubs have dealt first baseman Matt Mervis to the Miami Marlins for utilityman Vidal Bruján, according to sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Column: The path of Matthew Stafford looms for Caleb Williams
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — A skilled quarterback burdened by the dysfunction of his organization, doomed to toil in mediocrity for over a decade despite a high level of performance year in and year out.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Sportscasting icon Greg Gumbel dies at 78
item.description: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel, best known for his long career with CBS Sports, has died Friday, Dec. 27, according to CBS Sports and Gumbel's family.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, KTLA 5

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4
